info.name: Rolling Monarch
info.attribution:
Game layout, library image, and scripting by Robin Harn, released to the Public Domain under CC0.

The following graphics are from https://game-icons.net and are used under CC BY 3.0:
* Arrow Up
* Arrow Down
* Heart Plus
* Chewed Skull
* Card Discard
* Recycle
* Roll Dice

Coin icon is from Google Noto Color Emoji and are used under the SIL Open Font License: https://fonts.google.com/noto/specimen/Noto+Color+Emoji

The following graphics are from http://www.freepik.com and are used under the Freepik license:
* Letter A https://www.magnific.com/icon/letter_9590136
* Letter B https://www.magnific.com/icon/letter-b_9590140
* Letter C https://www.magnific.com/icon/letter-c_9590143
info.description: Bet points, chuck dice, and combine wisely to become the monarch!
info.helpText:
* Click the Next Round button to start a new round. Manually reveal the next bonus card (from the A, B, and C pile in that order).

* Drag and drop all victory point cards and bonus cards into your player board, then during the endgame, add up all your points to determine your final score.

resetDiceRoutine.note: // set random x,y to each dice

loopRoutine: var maxX = ${PROPERTY width OF holder-tray} - ${PROPERTY width OF dice-1}
var maxY = ${PROPERTY height OF holder-tray} - ${PROPERTY height OF dice-1}

fields.text: You're about to reset the game. Are you sure?

resetScoresRoutine.note: Set each player's starting score to 0, and starting coins to 5

fields.text: You're about to start the next round. Are you sure?

label-guide.text:
Round Structure:
* If empty-handed, draw 3 new cards
* Reveal new bonus card (A, B, C)
* Take turns (monarch goes first)
* Draft cards (highest row goes first)
* Award bonus card (if applicable)
* Assign new monarch (first drafter)

Turn Structure:
* Play card from hand
* Roll dice (up to 3x)
* Place meeple on grid

* Deck Composition:
-1, -1, -1, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 7
